sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n103764" key="th=de2" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τῆδε</orth>, dat. fem. of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὅδε</foreign>:—<orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τῃδί</orth>, dat. fem. of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὁδί</foreign>.</entryFree>
